arabic:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ “اتقوا اللاعنين” قالوا‏:‏ وما اللاعنان‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏الذي يتخلى في طريق الناس أو في ظلهم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Avoid two habits which provoke cursing." The Companions said: "What are those things which provoke cursing?" He said, "Relieving on the thoroughfares or under the shades where people take shelter and rest.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
